video_subject: Forex Broker Scam: How One Trader Lost Everything
video_script: It started with a single message on her phone, a stranger promising guaranteed profits in the forex market. The broker looked flawless, with a sleek website, glowing five-star reviews, and a friendly account manager who called her every single day. She started small, depositing just five hundred dollars to test the waters. Within a week, her dashboard showed her balance had doubled, and then tripled. Convinced it was real, she poured in her life savings, more than forty thousand dollars. But the moment she tried to withdraw, the platform demanded a tax fee before releasing any funds. She paid it, and then they asked for another fee, and another. Soon the website went dark, the account manager vanished, and every dollar was gone. What she never knew was that the broker was completely unregulated, and the profits glowing on her screen were entirely fake. Before you trust any broker with your money, check its license and read the warnings first. On WikiFX, one simple search could have saved her everything.
